_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1-dependent tumors require a microenvironment containing Nf1+/-- and c-kit-dependent bone marrow.

_contextSnippet: Overall, the mice treated with imatinib mesylate had a mean 50% reduction in FDG-PET uptake after treatment (p < 0.035)
